thig3.5:1.1: [Ubbiri recalls the Buddha’s words:] “‘Jīva, my daughter,’ you cry in the woods.
thig3.5:1.5: have been burned in that charnel ground.
thig3.5:1.6: For which of them do you grieve?”
thig3.5:2.2: the arrow so hard to see, embedded in my heart,
thig3.5:2.3: he expelled from me —overcome with grief— the grief
thig3.5:3.3: to the Buddha, Dhamma, & Saṅgha I go,
